summary.business: TEN Holdings, Inc. is a holding company for TEN Events, Inc., which provides event planning, production, and broadcasting services for virtual, hybrid, self-service, and physical events. The company primarily generates revenue from virtual and hybrid events delivered to corporate customers, supported by its proprietary Xyvid Pro and TEN Pro platforms.
summary.financials: Specific revenue, growth rate, and profitability figures are not provided in the prospectus excerpt.
summary.useOfProceeds: Not specified in the provided excerpt.
risks: Inability to maintain compliance with Nasdaq continued listing requirements
Inability to execute growth strategies and attract customers
Inability to hire and retain qualified management and key personnel
Trends and competition in the event planning and broadcasting industry

summary.business: Republic Power Group provides customized enterprise resource planning (ERP) software solutions, consulting, technical support services, and peripheral hardware to corporate and government clients in Singapore and Malaysia. The company generates revenue through project-based customized ERP software sales and related services, and is developing subscription-based SaaS ERP products expected to launch in fiscal 2026.
summary.financials: Specific revenue, growth rate, and profitability figures are not provided in the excerpt, though consolidated financial statements are referenced for fiscal years ended June 30, 2023, 2024, and 2025.
summary.useOfProceeds: Not detailed in the provided excerpt.
risks: Emerging growth company status with reduced public reporting requirements
Controlled company structure exempting it from certain Nasdaq corporate governance requirements
Best-efforts offering with no minimum purchase requirement, potentially resulting in insufficient capital
Dual-class share structure concentrating voting control with the Chairman

summary.business: Ambiq Micro designs and sells ultra-low power semiconductor systems-on-chip (SoCs) and integrated software that enable AI and general compute at the edge, using its proprietary SPOT platform to cut power consumption two to five times versus conventional designs. The company monetizes by selling these SoC solutions into personal devices, medical/healthcare, industrial, and smart home markets, powering over 290 million devices to date.
summary.sector: Semiconductors / Edge AI hardware and software
summary.financials: Net sales were $51.8M for the nine months ended Sept 30, 2025 vs $55.7M in the prior-year period; full-year 2024 net sales were $76.1M vs $65.5M in 2023. Sales to U.S., Europe, and Asia ex-Mainland China grew 61.2% YoY in the first nine months of 2025 with a 44.9% gross margin. The prospectus does not state net profitability in the excerpt.
summary.useOfProceeds: General corporate purposes, including working capital, operating expenses, and capital expenditures; the company will not receive proceeds from shares sold by selling stockholders.
risks: Concentration of revenue outside Mainland China and ongoing shift away from that market
Intense competition from larger semiconductor companies
Rapidly evolving AI regulatory landscape creating adoption uncertainty
Reliance on proprietary SPOT technology and continued ability to innovate on power efficiency

summary.business: Asia AI Group Inc. provides artificial intelligence (AI) solutions—including consulting, system integration, and ongoing technical support—to help businesses and organizations achieve digital transformation and operational excellence. The company, incorporated in California in June 2026 and wholly owned by Hong Kong-based Kingdom Financial Holdings Limited, monetizes through expert consulting services and seamless system integration for clients in the global digital economy.
summary.financials: The prospectus does not state revenue, growth rate, or profitability figures. The company was incorporated on June 2, 2026, and is offering 10,000,000 ordinary shares at a fixed price of $5.00 per share, targeting gross proceeds of approximately $50 million. No prior financial results are disclosed in the excerpt.
summary.useOfProceeds: Proceeds will be placed directly into the company's account (no escrow); funds may be used to pay offering expenses and for general corporate purposes as further detailed in the Use of Proceeds section.
risks: Company was incorporated only in June 2026 with no operating history or revenue disclosed
100% controlled by sole shareholder Kingdom Financial Holdings Limited, creating concentrated control risk
No assurance of Nasdaq listing approval; offering will not proceed without it
No minimum purchase requirement and all proceeds are non-refundable

summary.business: Varsal Tech, Inc. is a specialty and fine chemicals company with operations in the U.S. and China, focused on chiral compounds, chlorination, esterification, and crystallization-induced asymmetric transformation. The company serves pharmaceutical and crop protection markets through subsidiaries including Varsal LLC (Pennsylvania), Shanghai Varsal, Varsal Chemicals (Tangshan), and Varsal Technology (Tianjin). Revenue is generated through the manufacture and sale of specialized chemical intermediates and building blocks.
summary.financials: Specific revenue, growth rate, and profitability figures are not provided in this prospectus excerpt; the financial tables contain placeholder values pending completion of the registration statement.
summary.useOfProceeds: The Use of Proceeds section is referenced but not detailed in this excerpt; the offering is a firm commitment underwriting with a 7.0% underwriting discount and a 45-day over-allotment option of up to 15% of shares offered.
risks: No prior public market for Class A Common Stock; listing on NYSE American not guaranteed
Substantial operations in the People's Republic of China subject to regulatory and geopolitical risk
Emerging growth company with reduced reporting requirements
Dual-class share structure with Class B holders retaining disproportionate voting control

summary.business: Encore Medical is a structural heart device company focused on transcatheter closure of certain cardiac defects, building on over two decades of experience and more than 35,000 successful implants. The company offers closure devices featuring multi-element frame construction and a delivery system designed for procedural control and safety.
summary.financials: Not stated in the excerpt provided.
summary.useOfProceeds: Not stated in the excerpt provided.
risks: No prior public market for common stock
Emerging growth and smaller reporting company with reduced reporting requirements
High degree of investment risk
Reliance on clinical expertise and regulatory approvals in medical device industry

summary.business: Sensei Harbor Corp. is an early-stage company developing a universal, all-in-one platform for corporate training and development, aimed at helping organizations enhance employee skills and streamline learning processes. The company currently operates two publicly available websites related to its online educational and training platform, from which it generates revenue.
summary.financials: For the period from inception through May 31, 2025, the company reported $0 revenue and a net loss of $8,284. For the nine months ended February 28, 2026, revenue was $4,475 with a net loss of $3,345. The company is not profitable, and its independent auditor has expressed substantial doubt about its ability to continue as a going concern.
summary.useOfProceeds: Net proceeds will be used to develop business operations. The offering consists of 6,000,000 shares at a fixed price of $0.02 per share (maximum gross proceeds of $120,000), conducted on a self-underwritten, best-efforts basis with no minimum purchase requirement.
risks: Auditor has expressed substantial doubt about ability to continue as a going concern
Development stage company with limited commercial operations and minimal revenue
Penny stock subject to additional broker-dealer disclosure and suitability obligations
No public trading market exists and one may never develop

The company is pre-revenue and appears to fund operations primarily through related-party promissory notes and convertible notes payable rather than from mineral sales. No narrative business description or operational metrics are present in the excerpt provided.

summary.business: Game Your Game, Inc. operates a digital platform (associated with the brand 'Grafiti') whose specific business model and revenue generation mechanics are not described in the provided prospectus excerpt. The company is conducting a direct listing on Nasdaq rather than a traditional underwritten IPO.

summary.business: SeeQC, Inc. develops enabling technologies for scalable, commercially viable quantum computing, including superconducting foundry, chips, firmware, and software. The company aims to mirror the classical computing path to scale across these layers.
